prompt: A serious symbolic illustration of the reversed Herodotus image. Two threshold figures at opposite ends of historical time: one at the dawn of history looking back into mythic darkness, the other at history's evening facing a time wall and an as-yet-unnamed future. Quiet, austere, philosophical, architectural horizon, restrained light, no fantasy spectacle, no modern interface elements, no title, no labels, no handwritten text. One coherent image.
